description: US women's health platform combining virtual and in-person care. Operates 10+ clinics offering primary care, OBGYN, mental health, and wellness. Tech-enabled, patient-centered model.
business_model: B2C - Membership model + insurance; B2B for employer partnerships
target_market: US women aged 25-45, expanding to employers
key_investors: Define Ventures, ACME Capital, Torch Capital
competitive_advantage: Women-centric care model, hybrid delivery, strong brand loyalty

varden_fit.rationale: Reference model for women's health - replicable in European markets
